summary: Excellent performance with Phil’s standout bass lines, captured on a high‑quality audience tape despite mic changes between sets.
review: Both reviewers rave about the band’s playing – especially Phil Lesh’s “walking” bass – and describe the recording as a treat. It’s an audience source recorded by Mattes using Schoeps mics for the first set and B&K mics for the second, resulting in solid sound overall though the second half is noted as slightly less sparkly.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical praise (5‑star review) and generally good recording quality, with only minor comments about mic differences; limited number of reviews lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded by Mattes with Schoeps mics on set 1 and B&K mics on set 2; first set sounds clearer, second set a bit less sparkly but still solid.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Consistently strong performance throughout the concert; reviewers highlight overall excellent playing with no specific weak spots mentioned.

band_member_comments.Phil: Bass lines described as walking across the room with an enthusiastic long stride.
